content.en:
The area where the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe are fused is getting bigger and bigger, and the rules nearby are very chaotic, even a god-level powerhouse can't block the dual universe channel, and they can't arrange the formation, because the area is expanding, no matter how powerful the formation is, there is no way to prevent the fusion of the dual universe, even if the formation is arranged, it will be torn apart in the next moment.

Because of this, the powerhouses of the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe had no way to stop each other from sneaking in, unless they had been hiding here and constantly killing the cultivators who had come over from each other.

But this is undoubtedly a complete violation of the rules, and it is basically preventing the two universes from communicating with each other.

And those earth deities and god-level powerhouses want to transcend, then they will inevitably enter the other party's universe, who dares to break this rule.

Therefore, at the moment of diving into the other party's universe, no one will make a move, but if you leave the passage and enter the depths of the opponent's universe, if you are caught, you will really be caught.

But now, the information of the universe on both sides is basically understood, and no one deliberately intercepts and kills the other party's cultivators, so this period can be regarded as a relatively safe period.

Not to mention Ye Tian, even if it is an ordinary Earth Venerable sneaking into the Cangyu Universe, there will not be much danger, unless he deliberately seeks death, deliberately leaks his breath, and reveals his whereabouts.

this day.

Ye Tian passed through the cosmic passage and entered the Cangyu Universe, and immediately concealed his breath, and used his constant light divine power to leave quickly.

Although he was not afraid of the powerhouses of the Cangyu Universe, he didn't want to cause trouble to himself.

......

Cangyu Universe, Ancient Demon Cave.

The Ancient Demon Cave is a treasure land not long after the birth of the Cangyu Universe, 500,000 years ago, many gods and earth lords entered the ancient demon cave, and launched a tragic battle, with the fall of one god general, seriously injuring five god generals, and the other gods will end at an easy price, and the earth lord fell even more.

But this time the fight not only did not weaken the Cangyu Universe, but became stronger, because three Earth Venerables were promoted to the god general level, and dozens of ten-star Earth Venerables were born.

And this time it's all the result of the Ancient Demon Cave!

Because of this, the secret of the Ancient Demon Cave was leaked, and many cultivators of the Earth Venerable and even Human Venerable realms wanted to enter the Ancient Demon Cave, but the major holy lands had now controlled the Ancient Demon Cave, and it was too difficult for casual cultivators and ordinary forces to enter the Ancient Demon Cave.

But the holy places in various places don't dare to offend other forces too much, after all, even if the other forces are weak, if they work together, it will cause a lot of trouble to the holy land, and the holy land also needs resources, and there are often people who go out, in case they are targeted, the holy land will not have a good time in the future.

Therefore, the major holy places have also given some places, and some ancient magic orders are regularly released, and you can enter the ancient demon cave with the ancient magic order, otherwise you can only forcibly break through the blockade of the major holy places.

But the major holy places have built checkpoints outside the Ancient Demon Cave, and even three gods will sit in the Ancient Demon Cave for a long time, even if it is a ten-star Earth Venerable, if they dare to force their way through, they will definitely die.

A starry sky far away from the Ancient Demon Cave, Ye Tian stood here looking at the Ancient Demon Cave from afar, and muttered, "Sure enough, there are three god generals!"

The Life Heavenly Pupil has detected the life breath of these three god generals, but it is difficult to tell what level they are at, but they should only be one-star god generals, and it is unlikely that they are two-star god generals.

The two-star god generals are basically the top existences in the Cangyu universe, and they are all preparing for the impact of the three stars, and it is impossible to guard the ancient demon cave, but whether there are two-star god generals inside the ancient demon cave, Ye Tian can't judge.

Because of his Life Heavenly Pupil ability, he couldn't probe the situation of the Ancient Demon Cave.

"The inside of the Ancient Demon Cave contains the Ancient Demon Yuan Qi, which can refine the physical body and break the limits of the physical body, if there is a chaotic alchemy technique, it will be very fast to cultivate in the Ancient Demon Cave!"

This is the information that Ye Tian obtained, but the reason why the Ancient Demon Cave really attracts people to want to enter it is not because of the Ancient Demon Vitality, after all, many people have poor physical talents, and they don't have Chaos Body Alchemy Technique, no matter how much they refine their physical bodies, the improvement is not large.

The real chance of the Ancient Demon Cave is the Ancient Demon Tower!

The Ancient Demon Tower is a supreme treasure bred by the ancient demon cave, but it far surpasses other supreme treasures.

The Supreme Treasure and the Chaos Spirit Treasure belong to the same level, but the Chaos Spirit Treasure can only be conceived in the chaos, and the difference between the two is that the place where it is bred is different.

Theoretically, the Supreme Treasure is not as good as the Chaos Spirit Treasure, because the rules contained in the Supreme Treasure are not as good as the rules of the Chaos Spirit Treasure, but the aura emitted by that Ancient Demon Tower is even more than the top Chaos Spirit Treasure, and it is very close to the Chaos Treasure.

According to the division of chaos into chaos spirit treasures, low-grade chaos spirit treasures, medium-grade chaos spirit treasures, high-grade chaos spirit treasures, superb chaos spirit treasures and super grade chaos spirit treasures.

Under normal circumstances, the top of the supreme supreme treasure in the universe is only comparable to the top-grade Chaos Spirit Treasure, but the aura of this ancient magic tower surpasses the ordinary super-grade Chaos Spirit Treasure.

Cangyu Universe continued the inheritance and cultivation method of Chaos, and naturally understood the Chaos Spirit Treasure, when they found that the Ancient Demon Tower surpassed the ordinary super Chaos Spirit Treasure, and even equivalent to the value of several super Chaos Spirit Treasures, they immediately went crazy.

You must know how precious the super grade Chaos Spirit Treasure is in Chaos, even many Heavenly Destiny Realm powerhouses do not have super grade Chaos Spirit Treasures, and they still use the best Chaos Spirit Treasures.

If you get the Ancient Demon Tower and understand the powerful rules contained in the Ancient Demon Tower, you can improve your strength, and you can even hope to transcend.

And so, the fight began.

Then, they found that they could not take the Ancient Demon Tower, which was completely connected to the Ancient Demon Cave, and it was not something they could shake, and after discovering this, the battle was over.

But soon, they found that the Ancient Demon Tower was of great help to them.

The Ancient Demon Tower has a total of thirteen floors, and if you break through the thirteen floors, you can obtain the approval of the Ancient Demon Tower's spirit and directly become the owner of the Ancient Demon Tower, so that you can also take the Ancient Demon Tower.

But they found that this was too difficult, more difficult than detachment, so no one paid attention to the Ancient Demon Tower, and only regarded the Ancient Demon Pagoda as a cultivation pagoda, and entered the Ancient Demon Pagoda purely for cultivation and to improve their strength.

"According to the information obtained, the Ancient Demon Tower is purely a place to hone combat skills, once you enter the Ancient Demon Tower, the avenue, divine power, and rules cannot be used, only the physical body can be used, and the physical body can be used to perform some combat skills and continue to break through. It is said that many Earth Venerables are at the first layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, and they can't even break through the second layer, and even those god-level powerhouses are at most at the second or third layer, and there is no hope of breaking through the thirteenth layer at all. Every time you pass a level, you will get the purest ancient demon vitality, which can quickly refine the physical body. "

Ye Tian muttered.

From the information, it can be seen that the Ancient Demon Pagoda is a supreme treasure that purely assists in cultivation, and this kind of supreme supreme treasure is very rare, and it surpasses the super grade Chaos Spirit Treasure, its value is too high.

It's a pity that the cultivation of people in the universe is too weak, and it is difficult to use the Ancient Demon Tower, if it is placed in the outside world, the Ancient Demon Tower is estimated to be enough to cause a bunch of Heavenly Destiny Realm battles, and even cause many forces to fight.

"Whether or not you can impact the three-star god general this time depends on the ancient demon cave!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
